result: Built complete task template system with 8 GHL templates across 5 categories (CRM, Marketing, Automation, Reporting, AI-Powered). Backend: taskTemplates tRPC router with list (category filter), getById, and createFromTemplate endpoints. Frontend: TaskTemplates page with grid/list toggle, category filter buttons, stats bar, template cards, and detail modal with dynamic input forms and Run from Template button. Added sidebar nav entry and route.
